name: J1939CalcChecksum
title: J1939CalcChecksum
syntax: J1939CalcChecksum(pg * msg, char[] calculationMethod, dword & checksum)
description: Provides the checksum calculation for all PGNs as described in the J1939 Digital Annex. Possible calculation algorithms and message counter alignment is described in J1939 Functional Safety – Messages With Integrated Checksum and Counter.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: The parameter group to calculate the checksum for.

parameters.name: calculationMethod
parameters.description: Two letters in the form [A-E][a-f] (e.g. Bc) that define the calculation rule and position of the checksum and message counter.

parameters.name: checksum
parameters.description: Out parameter where the checksum is stored.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
